expectations.text: Recommends Layered or Modular Monolith or Microkernel as the top candidate
expectations.evidence: Recommends Modular Monolith with clear rationale.

expectations.text: Shows a ranked table with fit scores for all 8 architecture styles
expectations.evidence: Shows a scoring table but only for 4 styles (Layered, Modular Monolith, Service-Based, Microservices). Does not evaluate all 8.

expectations.text: Explicitly warns against or deprioritizes Microservices, Event-Driven, or Space-Based
expectations.evidence: States microservices has 'massive operational overhead, completely inappropriate for team size'. Rates it 1/5 simplicity.

expectations.text: Highlights low cost as advantage given budget constraints
expectations.evidence: Does not discuss cost categories ($/$$/$$$$). Budget mentioned only in context, not as a comparison axis.

expectations.text: Updates architecture.md with Selected Architecture Style section
expectations.evidence: architecture.md updated with Selected Architecture section.

expectations.text: Identifies a clear winner without extensive qualifying questions
expectations.evidence: Direct recommendation of Modular Monolith without qualifying dialog.
